caption: A football game takes place on a green field with white yard lines and red end zones. Players in white and purple uniforms are scattered across the field, engaging in a play. In the initial sequence, players in white move toward the right side of the screen while those in purple pursue them. On-screen graphics at the top show a score of "6" to "0", the time "2:29" and "2:28", and the down "2nd & 2". The text "ULTIMATE TEAM" appears in the corners. As the action progresses, a player in a white jersey runs with the ball, followed closely by purple-clad defenders. The text "UNDER PRESSURE POOR ACCURACY BULLET PASS" appears in a grey box at the bottom of the screen. By the end of the sequence, the player in white has moved further downfield, while defenders continue to trail behind.
